Order To Appear For Examination As To: Jamie R. Chavez Aka Jaime Revolledo Chavez.
Off Calendar Mar-06-2008 Discharged

Continued Order To Appear For Examination As To: Jamie R. Chavez.
Off Calendar Jan-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Steven B. Mains, Esq., for judgment creditor: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
David R. Olick, Esq., for third party examenee: Jamie R. Chavez

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Order of examination as to third party Jamie Chavez. Pursuant to CCP Section 703.120, plaintiff may inquire whether the third party has possession or control of property in which the judgment debtor has an interest or is indebted to the judgment debtor in an amount exceeding $250. In addition, plaintiff may question the witness as to whether he previously had possession or control of property in which the debtor had an interest or was indebted to the judgment debtor as such questions are relevant to the credibility of the witness pursuant to Evidence Code Section 780 and may assist the judgment creditor in determining the existence of property that may be subject to enforcement of the judgment. The Court specifically relies upon Exhibits C, D, and E to the memorandum of points and authorities submitted by plaintiff to establish good cause to permit questioning of the third party as to his current and prior business dealings with the judgment debtor.
Continued to March 6, 2008 at 2:00 p.m. to resume examination. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
